page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfr6.8xlarge is a memory-optimized virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 32 dedicated physical cores on an x86_64 Intel Xeon 8269CY processor running at a base frequency of 3.1 GHz. The system is equipped with 256.0 GB of RAM, providing a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core. It does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, relying instead on network-attached storage and a baseline network bandwidth of 10 Gbps.

Benchmark results place this instance in the average performance tier for its hardware class. The Intel Xeon processor achieves a stress-ng single-core score of 1436.69 and a multi-core score of 30656.07, supported by a 35 MB L3 cache and AVX-512 vector extensions. Memory performance is characterized by a read-only cached bandwidth of 1704.61 GB/sec, which drops to 112.52 GB/sec for uncached large blocks, and a write bandwidth of 49.63 GB/sec. In database-oriented workloads, the instance handles 28.86 million Redis SET operations per second and scores 11530.5 on PassMark database operations.

The lack of bundled local storage means that all disk I/O must go over the network, which may limit performance for disk-heavy applications despite the 10 Gbps baseline network bandwidth. However, the high memory density and dedicated CPU allocation make it a qualitatively cost-efficient choice for memory-bound workloads that do not require local NVMe drives. It is highly suited for in-memory databases like Redis, large-scale caching layers, enterprise applications, and memory-intensive data processing tasks.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfr6.8xlarge is a memory-optimized instance featuring 32 dedicated physical cores powered by an Intel Xeon 8269CY processor running at 3.1 GHz. Built on the x86_64 architecture and managed via the KVM hypervisor, it delivers 256.0 GB of RAM, translating to 8.0 GB of memory per core. The instance includes no local storage or GPU hardware, relying on a 10 Gbps baseline network bandwidth for external connectivity. Performance benchmarks show a multi-core stress-ng score of 30656.07 and a high-speed Redis SET throughput of 28.86 million operations per second. This profile makes it highly efficient for memory-intensive applications. It is best suited for in-memory databases, caching layers, and enterprise workloads requiring dedicated compute resources and substantial memory capacity without the need for local physical storage.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfr6.8xlarge is a memory-optimized instance featuring 32 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 256.0 GB of RAM, and a 10 Gbps network baseline, designed for memory-intensive enterprise workloads.

tagline: A dedicated memory-optimized instance featuring high-density RAM and Intel Xeon processors for demanding in-memory databases and enterprise workloads.

256.0 GB of RAM providing 8.0 GB of memory per core
10 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with no local storage
Delivers 28.86 million operations per second in Redis SET benchmarks
Optimized for in-memory databases, caching, and memory-heavy enterprise apps
